mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, ui.user_storeName AS userStoreName, ui.region AS region FROM User u LEFT JOIN User_Info ui ON u.user_id = ui.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.title AS title, p.content AS content, p.created_at AS createdAt, c.name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = p.post_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Comment WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS commentCount FROM Post p JOIN Category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT user_id AS userId, nickname, provider, provider_id AS providerId FROM User WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_id = #{providerId}

SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.content AS content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.post_id AS postId, p.title AS postTitle, cat.name AS categoryName FROM Comment c JOIN Post p ON c.post_id = p.post_id JOIN Category cat ON p.category_id = cat.category_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.title AS title, p.created_at AS createdAt, cat.name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = p.post_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Comment WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS commentCount FROM Like_Post lp JOIN Post p ON lp.post_id = p.post_id JOIN Category cat ON p.category_id = cat.category_id WHERE lp.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY lp.post_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE Comment SET content = #{content}, created_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
